annotations.title: Amerejuve MedSpa, Katy TX - Laser Hair Removal, CoolSculpting & Botox Katy

content.text:
Katy, Texas, offers a variety of reputable medical spas (medspas) that provide a range of aesthetic and wellness services. Here are some notable options:

**[4Ever Glow Salon & MedSpa](https://4everglowmedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.9 (110 reviews)**  
_722 Katy Fort Bend Rd #500, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers services including laser hair removal, microneedling, Hydrafacial, IPL treatments, and tattoo removal, with a focus on personalized beauty and wellness solutions.

**[Rich & Rooted Medspa](https://richandrootedmedspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 4.8 (17 reviews)**  
_24022 Cinco Village Center Blvd Suite 120 2A, Park Row, TX 77494_  
Specializes in non-surgical aesthetic treatments like Botox, dermal fillers, IV hydration therapy, and weight loss programs in a tranquil, upscale environment.

**[Aesthetic Master Infusions LLC](http://aestheticmasterinfusions.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 5.0 (51 reviews)**  
_5231 E 5th St, Katy, TX 77493_  
Provides advanced treatments such as CO2 Carboxy Facial, CoolJet Cold Plasma Facial, IV infusion therapy, and weight loss programs, emphasizing personalized care and FDA-approved products.

**[Amerejuve MedSpa, Katy TX - Laser Hair Removal, CoolSculpting & Botox Katy](https://www.amerejuve.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Laser hair removal service · 4.7 (197 reviews)**  
_2717 Commercial Center Blvd SuiteE170, Katy, TX 77494_  
Offers a wide range of services including laser hair removal, Botox, dermal fillers, CoolSculpting, and Hydrafacial, with multiple locations in Houston and Atlanta.

**[Katy Medi Spa](https://katymedispa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 4.5 (84 reviews)**  
_21238 Kingsland Blvd Ste. 1B, Katy, TX 77450_  
Physician-led medspa offering advanced aesthetic, wellness, and medical treatments such as facials, chemical peels, Botox, hormone therapy, and weight management.

**[Beauty RX Aesthetics Houston](http://www.beauty-rx-aesthetics.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Medical spa · 5.0 (16 reviews)**  
_25722 Kingsland Blvd Suite 201-E, Katy, TX 77494_  
Specializes in personalized aesthetic treatments including Botox, dermal fillers, microneedling, HydraFacial, and body sculpting, focusing on enhancing natural beauty.

**[H-Town Aesthetics](https://htownaesthetics.com/?utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=gbp&utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical spa · 5.0 (128 reviews)**  
_21003 Highland Knolls Dr Ste.300, Katy, TX 77450_  
Provides a range of services including Botox, dermal fillers, PRP treatments, hair restoration, and laser hair removal, focusing on personalized care and natural-looking results.

When selecting a medspa, consider factors such as the range of services offered, the qualifications of the staff, the quality of customer service, and the overall ambiance. It's advisable to schedule consultations with a few medspas to discuss your specific needs and determine which facility aligns best with your aesthetic and wellness goals.
